title: Chennakeshava Temple, Aralaguppe
tagline: Chennakeshava Temple, Aralaguppe — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Chennakeshava temple, dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu, is located in Aralaguppe, a small town in Karnataka state, India.
overview.description: The Chennakeshava temple, dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu, is located in Aralaguppe, a small town in Karnataka state, India. Aralaguppe is located 60 km from the city of Hassan. The temple was built around 1250 during the rule of the Hoysala Empire King Vira Someshwara. The temple is a protected monument under the Karnataka state division of the Archaeological Survey of India.

topPlaces.name: Banasandra
topPlaces.description: Banasandra is a small town north of Turuvekere, India. It is a commerce hub for Turuvekere region due to its junction of roads and railway systems.

topPlaces.name: Kibbanahalli
topPlaces.description: Kibbanahalli is a village in the Tiptur taluk of Tumkur district in Karnataka state, India. Kibbanahalli is a pre-historic site.

topPlaces.name: Agarahara
topPlaces.description: Agarahara is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Tiptur taluk of Tumkur district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Ammasandra
topPlaces.description: Ammasandra (sometimes referred to as Adityapatna) is a small township in Turuvekere taluk, Tumkur district in the state of Karnataka, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chennakeshava Temple, Aralaguppe?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chennakeshava Temple, Aralaguppe is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chennakeshava Temple, Aralaguppe?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (114 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (105 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chennakeshava Temple, Aralaguppe?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chennakeshava Temple, Aralaguppe at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chennakeshava Temple, Aralaguppe?
faq.a: Stays in Chennakeshava Temple, Aralaguppe start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chennakeshava Temple, Aralaguppe?
faq.a: The top attractions are Banasandra, Kibbanahalli, Agarahara, Ammasandra.
